title: Nybblecraft
description: The official modpack for the Nybblecraft server!
body:
## Important
This is the official modpack for the Nybblecraft server. This pack contains the mods necessary to play the server. Without it, you can’t join, so make sure to always use the latest version of this modpack.

## About
Nybblecraft is a public vanilla+ server, with the use of [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) we strive to make every players experience different. With the use of [Ledger](https://modrinth.com/mod/ledger) our moderators can rollback bases that were griefed. We also have strict rules for hacking or xraying, so if you even find someone using hacks or anything against the rules of our server, make sure to report them to one of the moderators just in case.

This modpack adds optimization mods like sodium, lithium, indium and more. It also adds every mod required to join the server.

## Mod information
For the claim system, we use the Open Parties and Claims mod. For more information, [see the Modrinth page of OPAC](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims).

[Xaero’s minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [Xaero’s world map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) are both built-in so that you can create waypoints. They also make it easier to explore around you.

## Discord server
For further information, please join the [Discord community](https://discord.gg/dZKj54zk8S). You are welcome to join!
